calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Ronald D. Schivo, Esq. appeared with planitiff Vicent Colabianchi, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gabriel Shepherd.
Default was entered against defendant Gabriel Shepherd on January 6, 2010.
Stipulation for Entry of Judgment was filed as to defendant Jacob Ott on July 29, 2010.
Revised Declaration of Vincent Colabianchi to Prove-Up Damages for Default Judgment Against Defendant Gabriel Shepherd was filed today, August 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 9, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Vincent Colabianchi, and against the defaulted defendant Gabriel Shepherd as follows:

Principal - $30,225.00.
Interest - $5,108.76.
Less Defendant's Security Deposit ($1,850.00)

Total - $33,483.76.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Gabriel Shepherd, Only.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Gabriel Shepherd, only.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ronald Sxhivo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Vincent Colabianchi, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Gabriel Shepherd or Jacob Ott.
Default was entered against defendant Gabriel Shepherd on January 6, 2010.
General Denial to plaintiff's complaint was filed by defendant Jacob Ott on August 14, 2009.
Cross-Complaint of Jacab Ott against cross-defendant was filed on August 14, 2009.
Trial on cross-complaint presently scheduled for June 28, 2010.
Does 1 to 10 have not been dismissed.

By Order of the Court, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff's request for judgment against defendants Gabriel Shepherd and Jacob Ott may be addressed at time of trial.
